title: Grath (disambiguation)
content:
'''Grath''' can refer to:

*"Deadeye" [[Grath (Deadeye)|Grath]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] criminal.
*[[Grath (dark trooper)|Grath]], a [[darktrooper]].
*[[Grath (stormtrooper commander)|Grath]], a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]].
*[[Grath (Vorzydiak)|Grath]], a [[Vorzydiak]].
*[[Scolex Grath]], a member of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

{{Disambig}}
